findings.title: API key in source code
findings.description: Hardcoded credential detected — must be moved to environment variables.

findings.title: Password comparison with == operator
findings.description: Non-constant-time password comparison is a critical auth anti-pattern in AI code.
findings.codeSnippet: if (req.body.password == '' || req.body.password == undefined || req.body.password == null) return res.sendStatus('400');

findings.title: Password comparison with == operator
findings.description: Non-constant-time password comparison is a critical auth anti-pattern in AI code.

findings.title: Ts Optional Chain Missing
findings.description: Deep property access without optional chaining. If any intermediate property is null or undefined, this will throw a TypeError. Use optional chaining (O?.src?.match) for safety, especially when dealing with API responses or database results that may have missing fields.
